task:
Write a complete Next.js 16 Server Component at app/design-1/_components/Testimonials.tsx that renders the IRON design's Testimonials section. Output ONLY the .tsx file contents — no markdown fences, no explanation, no preamble.

=== AVAILABLE TAILWIND TOKENS ===
Colors: bg-iron-bg #0e0e0e, bg-iron-panel #171717, bg-iron-card #1d1d1d, border-iron-line #2a2a2a, text-iron-paper / text-iron-text #f4f0e8, text-iron-text-dim #9a958c, text-iron-text-muted #5e5b54, bg-iron-orange / text-iron-orange #ff5b1f.
Fonts: font-iron-display (Archivo Black), font-iron-body (Archivo), font-iron-mono (JetBrains Mono).

=== AVAILABLE COMPONENT ===
import Eyebrow from './Eyebrow';   // <Eyebrow num='03' label='Transformations' />

=== DATA — render exactly this ===
const IRON_TESTIMONIALS = [
  { quote: 'I lost 38 pounds in eight months. More than that — I learned how to actually train. First time it stuck.', name: 'Marcus T.', detail: 'Build · 8 months' },
  { quote: 'I came in scared of barbells. Now I deadlift 235. The coaching is no-ego and the room feels like a team.', name: 'Jenna R.', detail: 'Foundations → Build · 1yr' },
  { quote: 'We sent six employees through corporate program. Energy, morale, retention — all measurably up.', name: 'David K.', detail: 'Corporate · 12 mos' },
];

=== STRUCTURE ===
Section: border-b border-iron-line, bg-iron-panel (slight panel shade for contrast against neighboring sections), px-6 py-16 lg:px-14 lg:py-[110px].
Header row (flex, items-end, justify-between, mb-14):
  - Left: <Eyebrow num='03' label='Transformations' /> then h2 'Receipts, not promises.' (font-iron-display, ~text-5xl/6xl, leading-[0.95], tracking-tight, mt-5).
  - Right (font-iron-mono text-xs text-iron-text-dim tracking-[0.12em]): '★ ★ ★ ★ ★ · 4.9 / 5 · 92 REVIEWS'
3-column grid (gap-5) of quote cards (stack on mobile):
  Each card: bg-iron-card, border border-iron-line, p-8, min-h-[320px], flex flex-col.
  Inside (in order):
    - Big orange open-quote glyph: font-iron-display text-5xl text-iron-orange leading-[0.8] (literal '"' character).
    - Quote text (mt-4, text-iron-text text-lg leading-relaxed, flex-1 so card balances).
    - Footer block (mt-6, pt-5, border-t border-iron-line, flex items-center gap-3.5):
      - Initials avatar: 44x44 circle bg-iron-line, centered, font-iron-display text-sm text-iron-text. Compute initials from first letter of each space-separated name part.
      - Right side: name (font-iron-body font-bold text-sm text-iron-text), detail below (font-iron-mono text-[11px] text-iron-text-dim tracking-[0.08em] mt-0.5).

=== CONSTRAINTS ===
- Server Component (no 'use client').
- Use ONLY: import Eyebrow from './Eyebrow'.
- Semantic HTML: <section>, <h2>, <blockquote> for quote, <cite> for name (or <figure>/<figcaption> if cleaner). Quote glyph should be aria-hidden.
- Use Tailwind utilities + iron-* tokens only.
- Apostrophes in quote text are fine inline (you may write the raw character).
- Output ONLY the .tsx file contents.
